title: The Straw Hats Break CP9’s Wall

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I've controlled the humidity and the temperature.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I own the weather in this room!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: And eventually strike your heart with thunder.
